<file>
00001| import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
00002| import { alchemy, createAlchemyInstance, getAlchemyNetwork } from '../../../lib/alchemy/config';
00003| import { GetNftMetadataBatchResponse, NftMetadataBatchToken } from '../types';
00004| 
00005| /**
00006|  * Hook for fetching NFT metadata for multiple tokens in batch
00007|  *
00008|  * @example
00009|  * ```typescript
00010|  * const { data, isLoading, error, fetchNftMetadataBatch } = useNftMetadataByTokenIdBatch();
00011|  *
00012|  * useEffect(() => {
00013|  *   fetchNftMetadataBatchOnSpecificChain({
00014|  *     tokens: [
00015|  *       { contractAddress: '0x123...abc', tokenId: '1' },
00016|  *       { contractAddress: '0x456...def', tokenId: '42' },
00017|  *     ],
00018|  *     chainId: 1 // Ethereum mainnet
00019|  *   });
00020|  * }, [fetchNftMetadataBatch]);
00021|  * ```
00022|  */
00023| export function useNftMetadataByTokenIdBatchOnSpecificChain() {
00024|   const [data, setData] = useState<GetNftMetadataBatchResponse | null>(null);
00025|   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
00026|   const [error, setError] = useState<Error | null>(null);
00027| 
00028|   /**
00029|    * Fetch metadata for multiple NFTs in a single batch request
00030|    *
00031|    * @param params - Object containing all parameters:
00032|    *   - tokens: NftMetadataBatchToken[] - Array of NFT token identifiers:
00033|    *     * contractAddress: string - The NFT contract address (e.g., '0x123...abc')
00034|    *     * tokenId: BigNumberish - The token ID within the contract (e.g., '1', '42', or BigNumber)
00035|    *     * tokenType?: NftTokenType.ERC721 | NftTokenType.ERC1155 - Optional token type
00036|    * @returns Promise<GetNftMetadataBatchResponse> - See type definition above for structure
00037|    */
00038|   const fetchNftMetadataBatchOnSpecificChain = useCallback(async (params: {
00039|     tokens: NftMetadataBatchToken[];
00040|     chainId: number;
00041|   }): Promise<GetNftMetadataBatchResponse> => {
00042|     setIsLoading(true);
00043|     setError(null);
00044| 
00045|     try {
00046|       const network = getAlchemyNetwork(params.chainId);
00047|       const alchemyForNetwork = createAlchemyInstance(alchemy.config.apiKey, network);
00048| 
00049|       const response = await alchemyForNetwork.nft.getNftMetadataBatch(params.tokens);
00050|       setData(response);
00051|       return response;
00052|     } catch (err) {
00053|       const error = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error('Failed to fetch NFT metadata batch');
00054|       setError(error);
00055|       throw error;
00056|     } finally {
00057|       setIsLoading(false);
00058|     }
00059|   }, []);
00060| 
00061|   return {
00062|     data,
00063|     isLoading,
00064|     error,
00065|     fetchNftMetadataBatchOnSpecificChain,
00066|   };
00067| }
</file>
